{{CargoOrgan
|name=Invisible Wing
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10935
|idx=136
|description=An invisible wing, its previous owner was an oriole bird skilled in invisibility. After failing to assassinate a demon god, the wing was broken and has since disappeared...
|skill=
|hp=2920
|def=265
|atk=262
|rush=251
|gene1=Wormhole Shards from Wormhole Refiner +4%
|gene2=Per 5 Wormhole Refines, {race} ATK +6
Wormhole Refines: 200/200
|gene3=Refining gives +1 Wormhole Refiner by +8%
|gene4=Refine +1 Green Rebel Material +8%
|gene5=Refine +1 Green Demon God Material +8%
|gene6=Refine +1 Green Gaia Material +8%
|gene7=4% chance to gain +1 Green Material
in Wormhole Refinement (Awakened)
|}}
